decision.phase1_cache_source: mask_bbox_relative_pseudo_track from internal Stage2 predecode masks/boxes
decision.required_next_teacher_step: wire CoTracker/TraceAnything teacher if physical long-range point supervision is required

CoTracker_or_CoTracker3.expected_point_count: 128-2048 query points feasible per object after adapter work
CoTracker_or_CoTracker3.gpu_memory_estimate: likely B200-feasible for batched clips; exact memory not profiled in V15
CoTracker_or_CoTracker3.license_status: external baseline used previously; OSTF teacher use needs separate protocol note
CoTracker_or_CoTracker3.speed_estimate: adapter exists for external baseline; OSTF mask-grid target generation not yet wired

PointOdyssey_GT.exact_blocker: PointOdyssey data not present under data/external or data/raw
PointOdyssey_GT.expected_point_count: dense GT possible only if local PointOdyssey data exists

TraceAnything.expected_point_count: interactive/sparse-to-dense depending adapter; no audited local checkpoint in this repo
TraceAnything.gpu_memory_estimate: unknown; must audit before full use
TraceAnything.license_status: third_party source present; official checkpoint/license not audited for OSTF target generation

internal_stage1_or_stage2_trace_cache.checkpoint_path: predecoded entity boxes/masks, not object-internal physical point tracks
internal_stage1_or_stage2_trace_cache.exact_blocker: not a true physical point tracker; must label as mask_bbox_relative_pseudo_track
internal_stage1_or_stage2_trace_cache.expected_point_count: M1/M128/M512 pseudo point targets can be derived from masks/bboxes
internal_stage1_or_stage2_trace_cache.gpu_memory_estimate: CPU materialization; no teacher GPU required
internal_stage1_or_stage2_trace_cache.speed_estimate: minutes for mixed split depending M
